title: Dekton Geckogrip 2pc Clear Bumper Set Large - Clear Rubber Feet| Adhesive Bumper Pads| Self Stick Bumpers| Sound Dampening Door Bumper| Cabinet Buffer Pads| 8.5 By 2.5 Mm| Strong Hold
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Premium Clear Rubber Construction: The Dekton Geckogrip Bumper Set features high-quality clear rubber feet that provide excellent durability and functionality. These bumpers are designed to be nearly invisible, blending seamlessly with any surface while offering superior protection and noise reduction.

Effective Sound Dampening: Each bumper pad is engineered to absorb and dampen sound, making them ideal for use on doors, cabinets, and furniture. They help prevent the annoying clatter and rattling of doors and drawers, creating a quieter and more peaceful environment in your home or office.

Protective Buffer for Surfaces: These bumpers act as a protective barrier between surfaces, preventing scratches, dents, and damage from impacts. Whether used on cabinet doors, furniture legs, or appliances, they help preserve the appearance and integrity of your belongings.

Compact and Practical Size: Measuring 8.5 by 2.5 mm, each bumper pad is the perfect size for a wide range of applications. The compact dimensions make them suitable for both large and small areas, ensuring comprehensive coverage and protection where you need it most.

Versatile Adhesive Pads: The self-stick adhesive on these bumper pads ensures a strong and secure hold on a variety of surfaces, including wood, glass, metal, and plastic. The easy-to-apply design eliminates the need for tools or additional hardware, allowing for quick and hassle-free installation.
description: The Dekton Geckogrip 2pc Clear Bumper Set is an essential solution for enhancing the functionality and longevity of your household items. This comprehensive set includes 200 pieces of high-quality clear rubber bumper pads designed to provide reliable protection and sound dampening. Measuring 8.5 by 2.5 mm, these self-stick bumpers are ideal for a wide range of applications, including door bumpers, cabinet buffer pads, and other surfaces prone to wear and impact. Each bumper pad features a durable adhesive backing, ensuring easy and secure application to various surfaces. The clear rubber design is both discreet and versatile, blending seamlessly with any decor while providing robust protection against scratches, dents, and other damage. The soft, cushioned material absorbs shock and reduces noise, making it perfect for dampening the sound of closing doors or drawers and minimizing impact on delicate surfaces. Ideal for use on cabinets, appliances, furniture, and more, these bumpers are a practical choice for protecting your home and belongings. The adhesive is strong enough to stay in place but can be easily removed without leaving sticky residue or causing damage. Whether you're looking to preserve the finish of your furniture, protect your walls from unsightly scuffs, or simply reduce noise, the Dekton Geckogrip Clear Bumper Set delivers effective, long-lasting performance. With a generous quantity of 200 pieces included, you’ll have more than enough bumpers to tackle multiple projects around the house.
